# Support

Stage is **experimental** software. Use [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/made-for-me/stage/issues) for bugs and concrete feature requests; broader questions can start there until Discussions is enabled for the repo.

## What to include

- Stage version or commit
- Node / pnpm versions
- Minimal steps to reproduce (for bugs)
- Expected vs actual behavior

## Commercial support

There is no paid support channel for this open-source repo; enterprise arrangements are outside this document.
